emails.subject: National Oil & Gas Coop
emails.body: Do you know the answer to this? Forwarded by Stacy E Dickson/HOU/ECT on 06/08/2001 03:12 PM Darren Vanek/ENRON@enronXgate 06/08/2001 12:58 PM

emails.subject: National Oil & Gas Coop
emails.body: Do you know the answer to this? Forwarded by Stacy E Dickson/HOU/ECT on 06/08/2001 03:12 PM Darren Vanek/ENRON@enronXgate 06/08/2001 12:58 PM

emails.subject: Re: National Oil & Gas Coop
emails.body: Re: National Oil Gas Coop I am unaware of any physical trading constraints relating to doing business with a cooperative. We have been doing business with such entities for years. Can he be more specific about where the restriction is concerning financial trading for a coop. Stacy E Dickson 06/08/2001 03:13 PM
